titleStmt.title: SII 38.530: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 530. (A.R. No. 530 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, Chōḷēśvara temple, right of entrance.

p.hi: King: Parakēśarivarman Rājarāja II Year: 4, day 126: 1150 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the usual meykīrtti of the king, Pūmaruviya poḻilēḻum etc.,

This inscription records an order issued by the king to the trustees (sthānattār) of Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār temple at Ūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu, assigning the (land) tax, forty four māḍai collected from the village Uḻuttampāḍi, in Kāṉakkiḷiyūrnāḍu, as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili, for conducting offerings and worship to the god Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār.

This inscription also records those officials of the land revenue department (puravuvari) who took cognizance of this arrangement, i.e., Koṟṟamaṅgalam-uḍaiyān, Śiṟupaṉṟūr-kiḻavaṉ Pullāli-uḍaiyāṉ, Siṅgaḷarājaṉ and others, who also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pū maruviya poḻileḻum poruppeḻum puṉai nittala
ttāma neṭuṅkuṭai poḻintaḷa veṇṇilākkuḷir potiyac cuṭar
c cakkaraveṟppil taṉṉaṭaic cakkara veyiveṟippa ciṉappuliyuñ ceṅko
lum maṉaittuyirkkuṅ kāvalpūṇappaṇiyaṇimicai pparañcoti pāṟkaṭal niṉṟeḻunta
ruḷi maṇineṭumuṭi kavittāneṉa maṇimaṭantaiyaik kaiyppi malar maṭantai
ṇiyāravarai mārvil kuṭi vāḻappulamaṭantai koḻuntākapRead koḻuntaṉaṉāki pormaṭantaiy maṇampuṇat
ntu parutimutal kulamiḷaṅkavum curutikaḷin poruc vāykkavum viḻunta vaṟucamaiyattai
y miḷaveṭut tātiyukaṅ koḻuntuviṭṭuk kiḷaittoṅka komātaṟaṅ kuḷir tūṅ
ka mārivāyttu vaḷañ curakka tāraṇiyor piṇi niṅka Antaṇar taṅkaṟpuyara nāṉmaṟaiyo
r tuṟaivaḷara Ellārun tanittaneye yām vāḻntaṉameṉa makiḻa Oruvaruṭanoruvarkku
ma neriruṭa nonṟukkum veruvaru pakai mantatinṟi viḻuntu kātaluṭaṉ cera Intiran mu
tal ticar paālareṇmaru vaṭivāki vanta paṭiyaiṉa niṉṟum manuvāṇai tani naṭātti māliyāṉaiye
ppapūṇ paṉmaṇiccilampe yaraṟṟu vaṉa celloṭaiye kalakkuṇpaṉa temara ve ṭu va
māmalarai koṭiyvāyina varupaṉa veñciṟaippaṭuvaṉa kāvalakaṉe koṭiy vāyiṉ kaḷḷuṇpaṉa va
ṇṭukaḷepoyyuṭaiyaṉa vaṉaveye pormalivaṉa veḻu kaḻaniye maiyyuṭaiyaṉa neṭuvaraiye
maruḷaṭaiyaṉa viṉamānkaḷe kayarkulaṅkaḷe piṟantoḻuku vakait tāyare kaṭintoṟuppāriyaṟ pulava
re poruveḻ pāricaip pāṇare kūṭañ cevvāreṉṟu kūṟi yivaṉ kākkun tirunāṭṭiliyal vituveṉa
niṉṟu kāval neṟipūṇṭu neṟiyallatu niṉaiyātu tantaiyil lor tantaiyākiyun tāyarillor
tāyārākiyum maintari(l)lor maintarākiyum manṉuyir kaṭkuyirakiyum viḻipeṟṟa payaṉeṉavum
ṟṟa varuḷeṉanavum moḻipeṟṟa poruḷeṉanavum pukaḻpeṟṟa paṉuvaleṉaṉavum Ettu
ṟaikkum Iṟaivane(ṉ)ṉavum yāñceyta peruntavameṉṉavum muttamiḻukkut talaivaṉeṉa
(ṉa)vum muṉṟulakil mutalvaneṉavum Araciyaṟ kaimuṟai niṟutti Allavai kaṭintāṟuyattu
p porukaliyiṉiruṇikkip pukaḻeṉṉu nilāp parappi kaṉṉaṭaruṅ kāliṅkarun teṉṉavaruñ ciṅka
ḷarum vaṅkāḷaruṅ koṅkaṇaruṅ kūvakaruṅ kāciyaruṅkām potaruṅ kocalaruṅ kuntalarum pappā
rum pāñcālarum poppalarum pūṟuvarum matirarum pāriṭarum vattavarum pātakaruṅ koṭinuṭa
ku kopurak koṟṟavācalili vantiṇṭi Iṭutiṟaikaḷane koṭi pul varir kaṟṟimilāṭa kalata
paṇṇaracuṭaṉṉai maṇmicai naṭāttuṅ kuyil Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻānaṭiyeṉṉum Alakil kaṟpi nāvinta maṭantaiyum tiru
tāṅkavaṟampurakkum Aruntutiyeṉ varumperumaiyavaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāḷum maṉṉiya perumpukaḻ maṭantai teṉṉavaṉ
maṇam puṇantiruppa Utaiyakiriyucciyeṟi mativeṇkuṭaip putuniḻaṟ kiḻaccantira mukamaṇṭapattut tāmaraikkaṭa cempava
ḷavāyiñ nilakuñcara moriḷampiṭiyuṭaṉu yānta teṉṉa cempoṉ virasimhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhuva
ṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 4āvatu tribhuvanaccakkaravart(ai)ti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūril kulottuṅkacoḻaīśvaramu
ṭaiyārkoyilil stāṉattārkku Ittevarkku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatākak kāṉakkiḷiyūr nāṭṭu vaḻuttamāpāṭi māṭai nāṟpattu m tevatāṉa
Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilārum varikku kūṟuceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari potakkāṭṭaccoṉṉom Ivvūr Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 4 100 2 100 2 10 6
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyiṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrk kulottuṅkacoḻaīśvaramuṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu
mutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyiṭṭa kāṉakkiḷiyūr Uḻuttampāṭi māṭai 4 10 4lum yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu mutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyiṭṭamaikku Ivai kaḷap
pāḷarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śrīkaraṇanāyakam koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam ciṟupaṉṉūr kiḻavaṉeḻuttu Ivai rāja
rājaviḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi pullāliyuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi neṟkuṉṟaṅki
ḻāṉeḻuttu Ivai paṅkaḷarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai nikarili coḻappallavaraiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrī karaṇat
tu mukaveṭṭi Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam marutūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravu(ra)vari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi Aruṅ
kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ikkalveṭṭut tirumukappaṭippaḻa Uḷvarippaṭiyum .
Digital edition of SII 38.530 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
